message:
feat(demo): add mouse interactions to Mermaid Showcase (bd-iuvb.17.10.3)

Add click-to-select samples, click viewport to toggle inspect mode,
scroll to navigate samples or zoom viewport. Includes Cell<Rect>
layout tracking and 5 new unit tests.
